source_description: Slice one of the loggable/testable/auditable session-log substrate: a separate local session-log file, a sandbox+harness, a repeatable check and a live trial, and a deterministic grader, proven on the parser-build flow. Also carries the runtime build-and-use-now parser doctrine update. See docs/building/planning/agent-interaction-audit-substrate.md and docs/building/adr/0011-session-log-otel-shape-no-library.md.
